queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account contributes to elevated credit default probability and serves as a primary credit risk driver.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Determinants of default: investigating the mitigating impact of lacking a documented savings account on borrower default rates and its correlation with reduced credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how minimal savings balances below 100 DM influence credit risk profiles and decrease the likelihood of loan delinquency.
